published_prior_art.cite: Rosenbaum1987SensitivityPermutation and Rosenbaum1988SensitivityMultipleControls establish statistic-restricted sharp sensitivity analyses; HuberStrassen1973Minimax supplies the representative-pair robust-testing framework.

repo_prior_art.cite: No active qid studies a finite all-tests Rosenbaum conditional least-favorable-mixture frontier.

published_prior_art.cite: HuberStrassen1973Minimax gives general representative-pair theory, while Rosenbaum1988SensitivityMultipleControls, GastwirthKriegerRosenbaum2000Separability, CohenOlsonFogarty2020AdversarialGame, and Fogarty2025Tilted retain statistic-restricted matched-study problems.

soundness_flags.label: ass:alternative-prior-factorization
soundness_flags.one_line: HuberStrassen1973Minimax is general robust-testing theory and does not support a product uniform alternative assignment prior; retag this as a modeling premise or cite a source for the intended assignment model.

soundness_flags.label: ass:alternative-record-factorization
soundness_flags.one_line: Zhao2019SensitivityValue is a pair-matched signed-score sensitivity-value analysis, not a source for a conditionally independent causal outcome-record model; retag and justify this alternative-model restriction.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: pair theorem and matched-set mixture question
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: The claims are conditional on fixed Gamma, a uniform product alternative assignment baseline, and specified dominated alternative record laws.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: Any exact least-favorable-law result concerns this conditional Fisher-sharp-null testing game only, not weak-null inference, ATE estimation, two-sided testing, or design sensitivity.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: State the product alternative assignment and record factorization as explicit modeling premises, with a realistic generative example showing when the likelihood-order and separation conditions hold.
Make the n=1, m=3 game the first substantive target: give explicit Q, Gamma, and alpha inequalities, compute the least-favorable mixture, and exhibit a genuine support switch away from P_n^+.

Add a short theorem-level comparison with HuberStrassen1973Minimax that identifies the precise new monotone-vertex or Rosenbaum-polytope property not supplied by generic least-favorable-distribution theory.

recommended_next_step: Revise the two unsupported standard tags into transparently justified alternative-model premises, then advance the worked m=3 mixture calculation as the novelty anchor before Stage 0.
